response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical expertise across multiple languages and domains, with significant experience in distributed systems, cloud technologies, and leadership. However, his background lacks direct experience with C++ (only ~2 years at National Instruments) and large-scale cloud architecture (preferred qualification). His recent roles focus heavily on Node.js/TypeScript, which may not align closely enough with the C++-centric compute platform requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience in distributed systems and high-performance computing (DLang, real-time systems)
Proven leadership in mentoring and establishing engineering best practices (workshops, courses, open-source contributions)
Strong background in large-scale infrastructure and DevOps practices (CI/CD, Kubernetes, microservices)
concerns: Limited C++ experience (2 years) relative to the 8-year minimum requirement
Minimal direct cloud architecture experience balancing short/long-term needs (preferred qualification)
Recent work focuses on Node.js/TypeScript rather than C++ or low-level systems programming
